headline: Uber to invest up to $1.25 billion in EV maker Rivian in deal to launch 50,000 robotaxis
summary: Uber plans to invest up to $1.25 billion in Rivian as part of a deal to deploy up to 50,000 robotaxis in several countries through 2031.
